Inazuma Eleven 3: Sekai e no Chousen!! The Ogre (JP)  —  Game code: BOEJ
Action Replay codes for melonDS (Setup cheats -> Add -> paste a block -> enable -> Reset).
Codes beginning with 94000130 FFFB0000 are BUTTON-ACTIVATED: hold SELECT in-game to apply.
For the item.STR reflow test, enable [All Equipment x99] + [All Uniforms (always-on)].
Source: inazumalife.com (button version); always-on variant derived by removing the SELECT conditional.

=== Infinite Money (Prestige) ===
020A0B14 000F423F
020A19F0 000F423F
